headline: InterDigital Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: InterDigital (NASDAQ:IDCC) reported what executives described as a “very strong start” to 2026, with first-quarter revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and earnings per share coming in above the top end of the company’s guidance range. headline: FCC Review Puts Disney Broadcast Licenses And Valuation In Focus
summary: The US Federal Communications Commission has launched an early review of Walt Disney's broadcast licenses. The move follows political pressure tied to public calls for action against an ABC late night host. The review focuses on Disney's core broadcast assets, raising fresh regulatory questions for NYSE:DIS. Disney, through ABC and related networks, sits at the center of US broadcast television while also running theme parks, film studios, and streaming platforms. The FCC's early review...

headline: Is Disney (DIS) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
